title: Prema Kavya
desc: Two sisters, Prema and Kavya, are pushed into unwanted marriages. Trapped between love, secrets, and expectations, they struggle to find happiness and acceptance in relationships they never chose.

title: Sri Gandhada Gudi
desc: To escape her bad luck, Chandana marries into a family with a troubled past. Can she bring back their lost hope, or will their dark history shatter her life?

title: Muddu Sose
desc: Vidya's ambition to become a doctor is put at risk when her father arranges her marriage, and her father-in-law opposes women's education, challenging her dreams and determination.

title: Shiva Shakthi
desc: A divine tale of Lord Shiva and Goddess Parvati, exploring their journey of love, duty, sacrifice, and separation, showcasing the strength and depth of their eternal bond.

title: Shantam Paapam S06
desc: True incidents of crime are explored as victims seek justice, with every story highlighting courage, tragedy, and resolution.

title: Prema Kavya
desc: Two sisters, Prema and Kavya, are pushed into unwanted marriages. Trapped between love, secrets, and expectations, they struggle to find happiness and acceptance in relationships they never chose.

title: Raani
desc: Rani, a hearing-impaired village girl, lives peacefully with her pet goat Cherry. Her life takes a turn when she meets Arjun, a kind-hearted city boy who brings new emotions and change.

title: Bhagya Lakshmi
desc: Two sisters are married into two different houses, yet their fate seems to be the same. With lies, treachery and illusions surrounding both the sisters and their worlds on the brink of explosion.

title: Muddu Sose
desc: Vidya's ambition to become a doctor is put at risk when her father arranges her marriage, and her father-in-law opposes women's education, challenging her dreams and determination.

title: Sri Gandhada Gudi
desc: To escape her bad luck, Chandana marries into a family with a troubled past. Can she bring back their lost hope, or will their dark history shatter her life?

title: Bhargavi LLB
desc: A Kannada serial following Bhargavi, a bold and passionate lawyer, as she fights for justice while balancing personal struggles, family issues, and professional challenges.

title: Maha Kshatriya
desc: A short-tempered young man is sent to prison after committing a terrible murder. His life finally starts to improve when a kind officer tries to help him change.
